word: G676 - ἀπρόσιτος - aprósitos - ap-ros'-ee-tos - Which no man can approach

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀπρόσιτος

- Transliteration: Aprositos

- Phonetic: ap-ros'-ee-tos

- Definition:

1. unapproachable, inaccessible

- Origin: from G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a comparative of G4314 and eimi (to go)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of a compound of G4314 and εἶμι eimi (to go); inaccessible: - which no man can approach.
